meta.incident: Redis primary connection refused -> worker consumer stalled -> order processing halted -> queue depth growing, amid recurring Redis SLOWLOG distractor warnings

ground_truth.desc: Throughput drop warning before hard failure

ground_truth.needle: error 111 connecting to redis-primary:6379. connection refused
ground_truth.desc: Redis primary refused connection (inside nested exception.values)
